name: codescope-review-impl
description: Implements the full 7-week roadmap from FEATURE-REVIEW.md: security fixes, acquisition setup, engineering foundation (repository layer), test infrastructure, feature build/verify, UX polish, production reliability, and soft launch. Designed for worst-case AI: every task has exact Find blocks (byte-for-byte match), Replace blocks, and verification commands.
author: CodeScope Team
prerequisites: Phase 1-4 codebase must already exist (run codescope-impl skill first)
Backend: python -m uvicorn app.main:app --port 8000 must start
Frontend: npm run dev must start at http://localhost:3000
FEATURE-REVIEW.md must be present at project root
dependencies: slowapi (pip install slowapi for rate limiting)
bcrypt (pip install bcrypt for password hashing)
Supabase project with REST API enabled
Supabase migrations applied via SQL editor
features: Phase 0: Hardcoded secrets fix, get_profile_id Bearer bug fix, shared trace auth bypass fix, spoofable user_id fix, CORS production fix, rate limiting, database migration pipeline
Phase W0: Early access page, landing page hero rewrite, anonymous session fingerprinting + analytics backend
Phase 1: Supabase repository layer (Phase 1.1), debug logging removal, E2E test environment provisioning
Phase 2a: Frontend unit tests (15 files, 80% coverage), backend contract tests with mocks, E2E test stability
Phase 2b: tracer/page.tsx fragmentation (≤200 lines), i18n wiring, dark theme on examples page, data-testid migration
Phase 3a: LLM streaming verification, What-If sandbox verification, shared trace UX verification
Phase 3b: Landing page rewrite, pricing page + freemium limits, responsive tracer layout, accessibility audit, bundle size audit
Phase 4a: Sentry error tracking, deep health check, request correlation IDs
Phase 4b: Prometheus metrics, production Docker image
Phase 5: Credibility assets, SEO setup, feature freeze, soft launch checklist
phases: Phase 0 (P0): Critical security fixes — 1 PR, 4 fixes (secrets, auth bug, shared trace bypass, spoofable user_id)
Phase 0 (P1): Production hardening — CORS, rate limiting, migration pipeline
Phase W0: Acquisition setup — early access page, hero rewrite, analytics
Phase 1.1: Supabase repository layer (6-step sub-file refactoring, Days 1-4)
Phase 2a: Test infrastructure — frontend tests, backend contract tests, E2E stability
Phase 2b: Engineering hygiene — tracer fragmentation, i18n, dark theme, data-testid
Phase 3a: Feature verification — LLM streaming, What-If sandbox, shared trace UX
Phase 3b: UX polish + pricing — landing page, pricing page, responsive layout, accessibility, bundle size
Phase 4a: Production reliability — Sentry, deep health check, correlation IDs
Phase 4b: Observability + Docker — Prometheus metrics, production Dockerfile

verification.manual_smoke_tests: See Phase Verification sections in SKILL.md
